ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
RecordType.DeveloperName ="Receipt", NOT(ISPICKVAL( PaymentType__c ,"CompanyCreditCard")), NOT(ISBLANK( CreditCardResponsibleCompany__c )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please validate payment type if you choose Credit Card.. (EC009)
